subject: Writing feedback. Real-time. No extra grading.
previewText: Join us on March 5 to see how SchoolAI Spaces support student writing in the moment.
module-4-0-0:
Hi {{ personalization_token('contact.firstname', 'fellow educator') }},

 

We all know strong writing takes feedback, reflection, and revision. We also know there are only so many hours in the day.

 

What if you could support student writing in the moment? You can catch misconceptions before they stick. You can do this without adding a single extra grading session to your week.

 

Join us for: Real-Time Writing Support with SchoolAI

🗓 Thursday, March 5
⏰ 4:00 – 4:30 PM

 

In this fast, practical session, you will explore how to use SchoolAI Spaces to:

  • Give real-time writing feedback
  • Help students reflect and revise on their own
  • Fix small mistakes before they become big ones
  • Reduce grading overload

 

Imagine students getting the help they need while they are writing. They do not have to wait days for a graded paper.

 

It is 30 minutes. Big impact. Zero extra grading.

 

Brittany, Stephanie, and the SchoolAI team
